info.title: Pipelinq CRM Register
info.description: Client Relationship Management register for the Pipelinq Nextcloud app. Manages clients, contacts, leads, requests, and pipelines.

x-openregister.description: CRM data model — thin client on OpenRegister, no own database tables

pipelinq.title: Pipelinq
pipelinq.description: Client Relationship Management register for Pipelinq — manages clients, contacts, leads, requests, and pipelines using Schema.org and vCard (RFC 6350) standards.

client.title: Client
client.summary: A client (person or organization) in the CRM
client.description: Represents a client entity — either a natural person or an organization. Mapped to Schema.org Person/Organization and vCard (RFC 6350) field conventions. Clients are the primary relationship entity in Pipelinq.

name.description: Full name of the person or organization (schema:name / vCard FN)

type.description: Entity type — person or organization (maps to schema:Person or schema:Organization)
type.title: Client type

contactsUid.description: Nextcloud Contacts UID linking this client to a vCard in the user's addressbook

contact.title: Contact
contact.summary: A contact person linked to a client
contact.description: Represents a contact person associated with a client organization. Properties align with vCard (RFC 6350) field conventions.

name.description: Full name of the contact person (vCard FN)

role.description: Job title or role within the organization (vCard ROLE)
role.title: Role

client.description: UUID reference to the parent client object

contactsUid.description: Nextcloud Contacts UID linking this contact to a vCard in the user's addressbook

lead.title: Lead
lead.summary: A sales lead or business opportunity
lead.description: Represents a sales lead — a potential deal or business opportunity linked to a client. Tracks value, probability, pipeline stage, and lifecycle status. Mapped to Schema.org Demand.

client.description: UUID reference to the associated client

contact.description: UUID reference to the associated contact person

source.description: Origin of the lead (e.g., website, referral, cold-call, advertisement, event)
source.title: Source

expectedCloseDate.description: Expected close date for the opportunity

assignee.description: Nextcloud user UID of the assigned sales representative
assignee.title: Assignee

pipeline.description: UUID reference to the pipeline this lead is tracked in

stageOrder.description: Numeric position of the current stage in the pipeline

request.title: Request
request.summary: A service request (verzoek) — the pre-state of a case
request.description: Represents a client service request that may be converted to a case in Procest. Tracks status lifecycle, priority, assignment, and optional pipeline placement.

client.description: UUID reference to the associated client

contact.description: UUID reference to the associated contact person

status.description: Current status in the request lifecycle
status.title: Status

assignee.description: Nextcloud user UID of the assigned handler
assignee.title: Assignee

requestedAt.description: Date and time the request was submitted

pipeline.description: UUID reference to the pipeline this request is tracked in

stageOrder.description: Numeric position of the current stage in the pipeline

channel.description: Intake channel for the request (e.g., phone, email, website)
channel.title: Channel

queue.description: UUID reference to the queue this request is assigned to
queue.title: Queue

caseReference.description: UUID reference to the converted Procest case

pipeline.title: Pipeline
pipeline.summary: A view-backed pipeline defining stages for tracking entities
pipeline.description: Represents a pipeline — an ordered list of stages through which entities progress. Backed by an OpenRegister View that defines which schemas appear on the board. Each schema can have its own property-to-stage mapping and totals configuration. Mapped to Schema.org ItemList.

viewId.description: UUID reference to the OpenRegister View defining which schemas this pipeline displays

propertyMappings.description: Per-schema configuration for column placement and totals aggregation

schemaSlug.description: Slug of the schema this mapping applies to (e.g., 'lead', 'request')

columnProperty.description: Name of the property that determines which column an item appears in (e.g., 'stage', 'status')

totalsProperty.description: Name of the numeric property to sum in column headers (e.g., 'value'). Null if no totals for this schema.

probability.description: Default win probability percentage for this stage (0-100)

isClosed.description: Whether this stage represents a closed/terminal state

isWon.description: Whether this closed stage represents a won/successful outcome. Only valid when isClosed is true.

color.description: CSS hex color for the stage (e.g., '#10B981')

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default pipeline for its entity type

product.title: Product
product.summary: A product or service that the organization sells
product.description: Represents a product or service in the CRM catalog. Linked to leads via LeadProduct line items for accurate pipeline valuation. Mapped to Schema.org Product.

sku.description: Stock keeping unit or product code (schema:sku)

unitPrice.description: Default selling price per unit in EUR (schema:price)

cost.description: Cost to the organization per unit (for margin calculation)

category.description: UUID reference to a ProductCategory object
category.title: Category

type.description: Whether this is a physical product or a service
type.title: Type

status.description: Whether the product is available for sale
status.title: Status

unit.description: Unit of measure (e.g., each, hour, license, month)

productCategory.title: Product Category
productCategory.description: Represents a product category for hierarchical grouping. Categories can have parent categories for tree structures. Mapped to Schema.org DefinedTermSet.

parent.description: UUID reference to parent category (for hierarchy)

order.description: Display order within the same parent level

queue.title: Queue
queue.summary: A priority queue for organizing work items
queue.description: Represents a named queue for organizing requests with priority-based ordering. Used for workload distribution and skill-based routing in KCC/service desk scenarios. Mapped to Schema.org ItemList.

complaint.title: Complaint
complaint.summary: A customer complaint registered for tracking and resolution
complaint.description: Represents a customer complaint linked to a client and optionally a contact person. Tracks status lifecycle, priority, category, SLA deadline, and resolution. Mapped to Schema.org ComplainAction.

categories.description: Category tags for routing (matched against request categories and agent skills)

isActive.description: Whether the queue is active and accepting items
isActive.title: Active

maxCapacity.description: Maximum number of items allowed in the queue (null = unlimited)

sortOrder.description: Display order of the queue in the list

assignedAgents.description: Nextcloud user UIDs of agents assigned to work this queue

skill.title: Skill
skill.summary: A skill or expertise area for routing
skill.description: Represents a defined skill or area of expertise that can be assigned to agents. Skills are matched against request categories for routing suggestions. Mapped to Schema.org DefinedTerm.

categories.description: Category tags this skill covers (matched against request categories)

isActive.description: Whether this skill is active for routing
isActive.title: Active

agentProfile.title: Agent Profile
agentProfile.description: Links a Nextcloud user to their assigned skills and routing configuration. Used for skill-based routing suggestions and workload management.

skills.description: UUID references to assigned Skill objects

maxConcurrent.description: Maximum number of concurrent open items for this agent

isAvailable.description: Whether this agent is available for routing suggestions
isAvailable.title: Available

status.description: Current status in the complaint lifecycle
status.title: Status

channel.description: Channel through which the complaint was received
channel.title: Channel

client.description: UUID reference to the associated client

contact.description: UUID reference to the associated contact person

assignedTo.description: Nextcloud user UID of the assigned handler
assignedTo.title: Assigned to

slaDeadline.description: SLA deadline for complaint resolution, calculated from category config

resolvedAt.description: Date and time the complaint was resolved or rejected

resolution.description: Explanation of how the complaint was resolved or why it was rejected

leadProduct.title: Lead Product
leadProduct.summary: A line item linking a product to a lead
leadProduct.description: Represents a product line item on a lead — an instance of a product with deal-specific quantity, pricing, and discount. The total is computed as quantity * unitPrice * (1 - discount/100). Mapped to Schema.org Offer.

lead.description: UUID reference to the parent Lead

unitPrice.description: Price per unit (pre-populated from Product.unitPrice, can be overridden)

notes.description: Line item notes (e.g., annual license, setup fee)

relationship.title: Relationship
relationship.summary: A typed bidirectional relationship between two contacts or clients
relationship.description: Represents a relationship between two entities (contacts and/or clients) with a typed, bidirectional link. Inverse relationships are auto-created. Mapped to Schema.org Person.knows.

fromContact.description: UUID reference to the source contact or client

toContact.description: UUID reference to the target contact or client

fromType.description: Entity type of source: contact or client

toType.description: Entity type of target: contact or client

type.description: Relationship type identifier (e.g., partner, ouder, werkgever)
type.title: Type

category.description: Category grouping for the relationship type (Familie, Professioneel, Organisatie, CRM Rol)
category.title: Category

notes.description: Optional free text context for this relationship

endDate.description: Date when the relationship ended (null = active)

kennisartikel.title: Knowledge Article
kennisartikel.summary: A knowledge base article for KCC agents
kennisartikel.description: Represents a knowledge base article with rich text content, categorization, and lifecycle management. Used by KCC agents to find answers during live citizen contacts. Mapped to Schema.org Article.

body.description: Article body content in Markdown format (schema:articleBody)

category.description: UUID reference to a kenniscategorie object
category.title: Category

tags.description: Tags for article classification and search

zaaktypeLinks.description: UUIDs of linked zaaktypen for contextual article discovery

visibility.description: Article visibility — openbaar (public) or intern (internal only)
visibility.title: Visibility

version.description: Article version number, incremented on each edit of a published article

author.description: Nextcloud user UID of the article author

lastUpdatedBy.description: Nextcloud user UID of the last editor

publishedAt.description: Date and time the article was published

archivedAt.description: Date and time the article was archived

kenniscategorie.title: Knowledge Category
kenniscategorie.summary: A category for organizing knowledge base articles
kenniscategorie.description: Represents a hierarchical category for grouping knowledge base articles. Supports up to 3 levels of nesting. Mapped to Schema.org ItemList.

parent.description: UUID reference to parent category (for hierarchy, max 3 levels)

order.description: Display order within the same parent level

kennisfeedback.title: Knowledge Feedback
kennisfeedback.summary: Agent feedback on a knowledge base article
kennisfeedback.description: Represents agent feedback on a knowledge base article — thumbs up/down rating and optional improvement suggestions. Follows KCS (Knowledge-Centered Service) methodology. Mapped to Schema.org Review.

article.description: UUID reference to the kennisartikel being rated

comment.description: Optional improvement suggestion from the agent

agent.description: Nextcloud user UID of the agent providing feedback

createdAt.description: Date and time the feedback was submitted

contactmoment.title: Contactmoment
contactmoment.summary: A registered contact moment (interaction) with a client
contactmoment.description: Represents a single interaction with a client across any channel (phone, email, counter, chat, social media, letter). Mapped to Schema.org CommunicateAction and VNG Klantinteracties Contactmoment.

subject.description: Subject of the contact moment (schema:about / Contactmoment.onderwerp)

summary.description: Summary or notes of the interaction (schema:description / Contactmoment.tekst)

client.description: UUID reference to the associated client (schema:recipient / KlantContactmoment)

request.description: UUID reference to the associated request (schema:object / ObjectContactmoment)

agent.description: Nextcloud user UID of the agent who handled the interaction (schema:agent / Contactmoment.medewerker)
agent.title: Agent

contactedAt.description: Date and time of the interaction (schema:startTime / Contactmoment.registratiedatum)

duration.description: Duration of the interaction in ISO 8601 format (schema:duration / Contactmoment.gespreksduur)

channelMetadata.description: Channel-specific metadata (e.g., call direction, email thread ID, counter location)

survey.title: Survey
survey.description: Represents a KTO survey with configurable questions, public access token, and entity linking.

properties.description: Represents a KTO (klanttevredenheidsonderzoek) survey with configurable questions, public access token, and entity linking. Mapped to Schema.org Survey.

required.description: Whether the question must be answered

token.description: Unique public access token (UUID) for the survey response URL

linkedEntityType.description: Entity type this survey is linked to
linkedEntityType.title: Linked Entity Type

linkedEntityId.description: UUID of the specific entity this survey is linked to

createdBy.description: Nextcloud user UID of the survey creator

createdAt.description: Date and time the survey was created

updatedAt.description: Date and time the survey was last updated

surveyResponse.title: Survey Response
surveyResponse.summary: A completed survey response from a client
surveyResponse.description: Represents a single completed survey response.

properties.description: Represents a single completed survey response with answers to survey questions. Linked to the parent survey via surveyId. Mapped to Schema.org CompletedSurvey.

surveyId.description: UUID reference to the parent survey

value.description: The response value (number as string for NPS/rating, text for open/multiple choice)

entityType.description: Entity type that triggered this survey response
entityType.title: Entity Type

entityId.description: UUID of the entity that triggered this response

completedAt.description: Date and time the response was submitted

ipHash.description: SHA-256 hash of respondent IP address for abuse detection

task.title: Task
task.summary: A callback request or follow-up task (terugbelverzoek / opvolgtaak / informatievraag)
task.description: Represents an internal task — a callback request (terugbelverzoek), follow-up task (opvolgtaak), or information request (informatievraag) assigned to a user or department. Maps to VNG InterneTaak and Schema.org Action.

type.description: Task type — terugbelverzoek (callback), opvolgtaak (follow-up), or informatievraag (information request)
type.title: Type

assigneeUserId.description: Nextcloud user UID of the assigned handler (VNG toegewezenAanMedewerker)
assigneeUserId.title: Assignee

assigneeGroupId.description: Nextcloud group ID for team/department assignment
assigneeGroupId.title: Group

clientId.description: UUID reference to the associated client

requestId.description: UUID reference to the associated request

contactMomentSummary.description: Summary text from the originating contact moment

callbackPhoneNumber.description: Override phone number for callback (may differ from client's primary phone)

createdBy.description: Nextcloud user UID of the agent who created this task
createdBy.title: Created by

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was completed

attempts.description: Callback attempt log — each entry has timestamp, result, and notes

default-pipeline-view.name: Pipelinq Default View
default-pipeline-view.description: Default view for pipeline boards — includes leads and requests from the Pipelinq register
